Test Case Description: Verify login with valid Email and valid Password.
Precondition: User is registered and Login page is open.
Test Steps:
1. Open the login page.
2. Enter testuser@example.com in the Email field.
3. Enter Password1234 in the Password field.
4. Click the Login button.
Expected Resut: User logs in successfully and is redirected to the Dashboard.

Test Case Description: Verify login with a valid Email and an invalid short Password (7 characters).
Test Steps:
1. Open the login page.
2. Enter testuser@example.com in the Email field.
3. Enter Pass12345 (7 characters) in the Password field.
4. Click the Login button.
Expected Resut: System should not allow login and should display a validation error because the password must be at least 8 characters long.
